title: Executive Order 7921—Extending the Existence of the Quetico-Superior Committee, Created by Executive Order No. 6783 of June 30, 1934
text:
By virtue of the authority vested in me as President of the United States, I hereby extend the existence of the Quetico-Superior Committee, created by Executive Order No. 6783 of June 30, 1934, for a period of four years, from June 30, 1938 to June 30, 1942.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
June 30, 1938.
